title: Audiology Mission and Vision
content:
Audiology Mission and Vision

Vision

To be a reputable and pioneer department which protects and improves public health by working multidisciplinary and providing international clinic and academic standards.

Mission

To graduate audiologists who are qualified vocationally and academically who puts health public first, respects human rights and follows ethics, is aware of technologic innovations, works multidisciplinary and always has a will to learn.
